  "session": {

    "event": {
      "id": 4587,
      "name": "* API NUMBERED EVENT",

        "title": {

          "en-US": "",
          "es-ES": "<p align=\"LEFT\">Descripción corta ñ.`+^'w8rqwht' Ñ' ?</p>"

        "description_long": {
          "en-US": "",
          "es-ES": "<p align=\"LEFT\">Hola qué tal</p>"
